2025 AAAI 中稿论文分布与清单

  • 状态：available
  • 官方入口：https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/issue/archive/3
  • 备注：Collected from AAAI-25 Technical Tracks 1-25 OJS issues only; special tracks and abstracts excluded.
  • 纳入论文数：3028

Distribution

领域 篇数 占比
LLM/NLP 291 9.6%
Computer Vision 778 25.7%
Multimodal 45 1.5%
Reinforcement Learning 95 3.1%
Robotics/Embodied AI 22 0.7%
Generative Models 190 6.3%
AI for Science 41 1.4%
ML Theory 45 1.5%
Optimization 80 2.6%
Trustworthy/Safety/Fairness 129 4.3%
Data/Training Systems 324 10.7%
Applications 168 5.5%
Other 820 27.1%
Total 3028 100.0%
